pvs.author: dateken
pvs.description: お世話になってます．DATEKENです．投稿十五曲目．わたぽんさんのイラストをイメージしたピアノ曲です．もうぶわっと沸きました．素敵なイラストを有難うございます！いつの間にやらヴォーカルがミクAppend(soft lib.)になってしまったのですが，なんと，わたぽんさんがイラストのミクver.を描いてくださりました．DATEKENは幸せ者です．重ねて御礼申し上げます．mp3／歌詞はこちら．(http://piapro.jp/dateken)，他曲はこちらから．（mylist/10109173）余談：このムービーを作るために，Cardioidの描画＆bmp書き出しプログラムを作りました．無駄な労力．バレンタイン…だと…？
pvs.name: 【初音ミク】 Cardioid 【オリジナル曲】

pvs.author: Zumux3
pvs.description:
▌Video Information▐ 
Author: DATEKEN
Illustrator: わたぽん (Watapon)
Artist: 初音ミク (Miku Hatsune) Append Ver.
NicoNicoDouga ID: /sm9714971

This video is a reprint of the original video on NND all credit goes to the original owners and creators except for translations. ^^

Cardioid: It is a heart-shaped curved generated by a fixed point on a circle as it rolls around another fixed circle of equal radius. It is used to represent a heart cause it looks like a heart when drawn. (More like an apple or peach though...)

▌MP3 Download Link▐
http://www.mediafire.com/?y4m1oqm2zdw

▌English Lyrics Information▐
There are many ways to interpret this song's meaning cause that is how DATEKEN made it. This is just how I translated it so if it is different from someone else's translations does not make it wrong. So yeah...

▌Translator Notes▐
★ I am finally back right? This year I will try and catch up to a lot of new Vocaloid stuff as well as old ones. I will now only upload HD videos hopefully so I have a lot more work on my hands.
★ I will not offer up video downloads because it is too much of a hassle plus I do not want to pay for accounts on file hosting sites.
★ I will offer MP3 downloads though cause it's easier to handle in which I can make multiple accounts on file hosting sites.
★ I did this video over a span of 2 months...cause I got distracted. I will put up a romaji/karaoke video next...it would've been to much for the eyes if I subbed those on this video.
★ I will NOT take up video request at this moment cause I need to get organized and planned.
★ I will redo all of my subbed videos from before but will not delete my old ones cause they have a lot of views and favorites and such. ^^
★ I used the Append Ver. cause it was prettier. o-o

So I've been gone awhile and hopefully I can catch up with everything. I am also planning on things and catching up with manga uploads and anime to watch. (Can't wait for B★RS anime) Once I get everything organized, maybe a website/blog I will take requests! For more information and FAQ go to my channel. To know what I'm doing subscribe to me and once I get a twitter follow me. ^^

Love you all,
Ayume (Zumu)
pvs.name: [HD] Cardioid -  初音ミク (Miku Hatsune) {Eng Subs}
